## Summary

Briefly describe your change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Suggest / add book title(s) (link optional — maintainers can attach Drive)
- [ ] Fix broken / incorrect link(s)
- [ ] Documentation / structure improvement
- [ ] Library app (`web/`) change
- [ ] CI or repository health

## Checklist

- [ ] If adding/changing URLs, follows the [link policy](../CONTRIBUTING.md#link-policy)
- [ ] Title-only suggestions are OK without a Drive link
- [ ] Correct language file and skill-level section (when editing docs)
- [ ] No duplicate titles on the same page
- [ ] Markdown formatting is valid

## Notes

Optional context for reviewers.
